scoreBreakdown.label: Evidence Strength
scoreBreakdown.improvementFocus: Add concrete outcomes and proof for the highest-weight role requirements.

scoreBreakdown.label: Role Relevance
scoreBreakdown.improvementFocus: Connect recent experience more directly to new business and lead generation.

scoreBreakdown.label: Impact Clarity
scoreBreakdown.improvementFocus: Use measurable impact where the resume can support it.

aiRecruiterVerdict.oneLineVerdict: The resume shows relevant sales leadership, but the strongest requirements need clearer proof.
aiRecruiterVerdict.mainConcern: Lead generation and measurable growth evidence are not specific enough.
aiRecruiterVerdict.strongestSignal: Recent account ownership and sales management experience.
aiRecruiterVerdict.weakestSignal: Limited quantified pipeline and conversion outcomes.

jobRequirementProfile.recruiterIntentSummary: The role is looking for a front-line sales leader who can create pipeline, convert prospects, and show measurable revenue impact.

topPriorities.evidenceExpected: Specific pipeline creation, prospecting volume, or conversion outcomes.
topPriorities.whyItMatters: The job description emphasizes creating new opportunities rather than only managing existing accounts.

topPriorities.evidenceExpected: Revenue, quota attainment, margin, or growth metrics.
topPriorities.whyItMatters: Screeners need evidence that sales activity translated into business outcomes.

topPriorities.evidenceExpected: Named account scope, customer segment, renewal, expansion, or stakeholder examples.
topPriorities.whyItMatters: The role requires maintaining buyer confidence while expanding opportunities.

topPriorities.evidenceExpected: Salesforce, pipeline hygiene, forecast accuracy, or reporting examples.
topPriorities.whyItMatters: Clean pipeline management helps recruiters trust the candidate can operate in a structured sales process.

requirementScores.evidence: Managed key accounts and developed customer relationships.
requirementScores.gap: The resume does not clearly quantify prospecting volume or new qualified opportunities.
Revenue, quota, margin, or growth outcomes are not visible.

requirementScores.evidence: Managed key accounts and supported customer relationships.
Sales reporting is implied but not specific.
requirementScores.gap: CRM tools and forecast process are not named.

fixThisFirst.title: Add proof for new business creation
fixThisFirst.why: New pipeline creation is the highest-weight gap for this role.
fixThisFirst.action: Add accurate prospecting, pipeline, or conversion evidence from recent sales work.

fixThisFirst.title: Quantify sales outcomes
fixThisFirst.why: Metrics help recruiters distinguish responsibility from performance.
fixThisFirst.action: Add supported revenue, quota, margin, retention, or growth metrics.

issues.problem: Recent sales bullets describe responsibilities but do not show measurable outcomes.
issues.suggestion: Add supported revenue, quota, pipeline, or conversion metrics to the most relevant bullets.
issues.whyItMatters: Metrics help recruiters and automated screening workflows understand the scale and impact of your work.
requiresUserInput: Revenue, quota, or pipeline metrics from recent sales roles

issues.problem: Some role headings may be harder to scan quickly.
issues.suggestion: Use standard section labels and keep employer, title, and dates visually consistent.
issues.whyItMatters: Consistent formatting helps recruiters and ATS parsing workflows locate experience details.
issues.evidence: Sales Manager heading lacks date consistency.

bulletRewrites.before: Managed key accounts and developed customer relationships.
bulletRewrites.after: Managed strategic customer relationships across key accounts, improving account coverage and strengthening renewal opportunities.
bulletRewrites.rationale: Keeps the claim supported while making account ownership and business value clearer.

bulletRewrites.before: Generated new leads for sales team.
bulletRewrites.after: Generated {{new_qualified_prospects_per_quarter}} qualified prospects per quarter and converted {{conversion_rate}} into active opportunities.
bulletRewrites.rationale: This would directly address the new-business requirement, but the numbers must be accurate.

quickWins: Add supported sales metrics to the most relevant role.
mediumEffort: Rewrite top bullets around pipeline creation and revenue impact.
deepFixes: Reframe the experience section around job-critical sales outcomes.
